g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain sinusoidal timestep embedding in diffusion models')
sendPrompt('Explain class conditioning via nn.Embedding in DiT')
sendPrompt('Why is SiLU used as activation for conditioning in DiT?')
sendPrompt('Explain the full DiTBlock: RMSNorm, AdaLN modulate, self-attention, gate, MLP')
sendPrompt('How do stacked DiT blocks progressively refine the output?')
sendPrompt('Why is there a final RMSNorm after all DiT blocks?')
sendPrompt('Explain the final AdaLN modulation before unpatching in DiT')
sendPrompt('Explain UnPatch: how does DiT convert token sequences back to image pixels?')
